content: Official ChamSys and ETC manuals corroborate the conventional console model: a programmer overrides playback while building cues; reusable groups and intensity/colour/beam/position palettes feed cues; cue stacks support ordered cues, chases, fade/delay/wait timing, GO/PAUSE, faders and flash buttons; grand masters and blackout affect intensity; playback displays current and next state. GOLC v1 should implement a small-show subset of this model rather than clone console-scale tracking and capacity.
